risk_on.description: Bullish regime: VIX < 18, S&P trending up, growth sectors leading
rules: Widen stops by 1.5x — trends run further than expected
Focus on growth, tech, and consumer discretionary
Mean reversion sells are lower probability — don't fade strength

risk_off.description: Bearish regime: VIX > 25, S&P trending down, defensives leading. Current state as of March 2026: VIX 26.78, Middle East conflict, Fed hawkish at 3.50-3.75%
rules: Prefer mean reversion and defensive strategies
Tighten stops — reversals are violent in fear environments
Focus on energy (supply disruption), healthcare, consumer staples
Avoid catching falling knives in tech/growth names
Look for oversold bounces but take profits quickly
Cash is a position — 30-50% cash is appropriate in risk-off

neutral.description: Choppy regime: VIX 18-25, no clear trend, sector rotation active
rules: Prefer range-bound strategies: support/resistance, VWAP reversion
Take profits quickly — moves don't follow through in chop
Avoid trend-following strategies — false breakouts are common
Focus on stocks with specific catalysts, not broad market bets
